use_cases: Dynamic hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Animated decorative backgrounds for SaaS dashboards
Eye-catching visual headers for marketing websites
Ambient animated backgrounds for media and creator platforms
Branded gradient animations for fintech landing pages
ai_summary: An animated gradient component with multiple presets (Prism, Lava, Plasma, Pulse, Vortex) featuring swirling, distortion-based animations with customizable colors, shapes, and motion parameters. Creates fluid, continuous gradient animations ideal for hero sections and decorative backgrounds.
